neighborhoods.name: Downtown Quincy
neighborhoods.description: Small historic county seat with Coca-Cola millionaire heritage, courthouse square, and Main Street shops
neighborhoods.character: Small-town historic, Coca-Cola heritage, Main Street

housing.predominantType: Historic houses, small apartments, and older homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Quincy. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Havana
neighborhoods.description: Artsy small town north of Quincy known for antique shops, art galleries, and weekend tourism
neighborhoods.character: Artsy antique town, galleries, weekend tourism

housing.predominantType: Renovated cottages, historic houses, and small homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Quincy's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Gretna / Midway
neighborhoods.description: Small Gadsden County communities with very affordable housing and rural character
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: North Quincy / Lake Talquin Area
neighborhoods.description: Lakefront area with fishing, hunting, and nature recreation near Lake Talquin
neighborhoods.character: Lakefront, fishing and hunting, nature recreation

housing.predominantType: Lake houses, rural homes, and modest properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
